feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Graph
feed.subtitle: SAP Graph Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP font text in specific t.code
entry.content:
Hi

Is it possible to change the font to bold on some of the sloc overview?

I dont mean the font in SAP general, but like some sloc have bold text and some dont...

Example:

Sloc

Branch 1100 xxxxxxxxx

Van 1112 xxxxxxxxx

Van 1113 xxxxxxxxx

Branch 1300 xxxxxxxxx

Van 1310 xxxxxxxxx

Van 1311 xxxxxxxxx

There reason for this is to be able to easily see in MMBE what is branch and what is van.

I can change the sloc id in OX09 and call it "what I want" but for now, I have branches with caplock and van no caplock. Maybe the only solution, but wanted to ask if it also could be possible with caplock+bold on branches.

Thanks.

entry.title: Is SAP Graph storing the data
entry.content:
Hi ,
Please help me resolve some of my doubts on  SAP Graph

1. How the data from SAP Graph is stored, is the data being stored at the graph layer on cloud or on each time we call the graph url , is it getting the data from server.
2. If we are using the Graph to combine two odata API from on prem/ cloud, on each time we call the graph api , will we be getting the latest data or do we have to activate the BDG to get the latest data.
3. After creating the graph , we are able to see a namespace called sap.graph , what is the importance of that and when to use it.

Thanks and Regards,
Keerthana

entry.title: When I am creating the vendor getting error like allocate the last number of the interval
entry.content: When I am creating the vendor getting error like allocate the last number of the interval

entry.title: Beas in Item Structure
entry.content:
Hi,

Can anyone help me on . What are the table Beas apply in Item Structure multi level BOM (Sub level Bom). How to do in sql level1, level2, level3 and level 4.I need output exactly same as item structure. Kindly help me the issue.

Thanks. 

Regards,

Seetha

entry.title: Como fazer um Ranking de 10 maiores valores no gráfico de ponto numérico no SAC?
entry.content:
Estou tentando desenvolver um gráfico de barras que mostre o ranking dos 10 principais itens e clientes, juntamente com o total da soma desses valores. No entanto, estou enfrentando dificuldades para garantir que o total represente apenas os 10 primeiros itens, em vez de todos os itens. Também tentei criar um gráfico de ponto numérico para exibir a soma dos 10 itens mais vendidos, mas ele está mostrando a soma de todos os itens. Alguém tem alguma sugestão de como posso garantir que o total represente apenas a soma dos 10 itens mais classificados?

SAP Analytics Cloud

entry.title: Su24
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Good day.

If any one changed the authorization objects in Su24 I want to troubleshoot those changes how can I troubleshoot?

Regards,

Abhiram

entry.title: "Place of supply not determined"
entry.content:
hi All

While posting invoice in MIRO, getting this message "Place of supply not determined"

Im using s/4hana.

Thanks and appreciate your quick feedback.

entry.title: Se16n view change
entry.content: I know there is a way to change the view of tables in tranzaction Se16n /se16 from the first picture to the second one but I can not find

entry.title: SAP Integration Suite - Graph / create requests
entry.content:
Hello everybody!

I'm working on SAP Graph and I'm wondering how a Business Partner could be created. In the moment my Business graph has only one source which is a S4/HANA instance (RISE contract / not cloud).

What I miss is the BusinessPartnerCategory attribute. So at a API POST request using /sap.graph/BusinessPartner I get error 'Business partner category  does not exist'. 

Also the API Navigator says id  -> 'This attribute is required for Create requests'. But I want to create one.

Please  could you give some hints. How should the body of the POST look like.

Thx and best regards,

Ralf Schneider

entry.title: SAP Integration Suite - Graph / Create,Update action on Association
entry.content:
Hi all,

I tried a  API create action on an custom graph object where an association (0 or 1) to another custom object exists. This one have to be also created in the same request.

Is it true that in principal this is not supported by Graph? It is not clear to me by the documentation.

From a logical point of view it should be possible. The key/foreign key association determines the sequence of the underlying API create requests. But it seems not supported.

The response of the API request is 'No cross-service expanding allowed in entity creation/update'.

Thx for a clarification,

Ralf

entry.title: Dunning process
entry.content:
Hi Everyone, I want to know that where can we define multiple payment methods in Dunning process and why do we have 2 payment methods in APP for country and company code. 

Best, 

Mallikarjun

entry.title: Microchart column custom colors issues SAP UI5/FIORI
entry.content:
same applied in samples too is it a bug or any solution please help 

When applied color property its applied to and top label 100 also applied how could I remove it when try to apply with css on the element its working at debug mode but when applied in code its not working

entry.title: How do you suppress a total in a stacked bar graph. I have 2 values, but for the 2 value its a sum
entry.content: How do you suppress a total in a stacked bar graph. I have 2 values, but for the 2 value its a summation in the 2nd level.  Example section 1 = 3, and section 2 = 1 I want section 2 to display 1, but its doing a summation and showing 4 i.e. 3+ 1 = 4.  I want section 2 to display its value of 1 and not a summation of the 2 sections.

entry.title: 从0开始的SAP世界 Day1
entry.content:
1.ERP是什么？

全称：Enterprise Resource Planning。

中文：企业资源规划

解释：整合企业的各个部门（财务、销售、生产、库存等），让企业高效运转。可以理解成企业的大脑。

核心功能：财务管理，库存管理，销售与客户记录，生产管理，采购管理等。

代表性的ERP系统：SAP、Saleforce、Oracle、Microsoft Dynamics 365、Workday

SAP：德语“Systeme, Anwendungen und Produkte”，意思是“系统、应用与产品”。自 1972 年创立以来，SAP 一直是全球企业管理软件领域的领导者。

2.SAP的各个模块

entry.title: Would require vendor short pay enhancement configuration step in SAP S4 HANA
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Could you please provide configuration steps for vendor short pay enhancements which can be done in SAP S4 HANA? also kindly provide videos with regards to this topic.

Regards,

Chinnavva

entry.title: unable to visualize Heterogenous graph in sap hana . Getting error as "GRAPH_WORKSPACE_HETERO_NOT_SU
entry.content:
I have created a Heterogenous graph workspace in my sap hana cloud db . 
however when i try to visaulize the same from the UI i am getting this exception .

"an exception (error) occurred "GRAPH_WORKSPACE_HETERO_NOT_SUPPORTED" 

  

Following is the schema i have used 

 

 

 CREATE SCHEMA SK_GRAPH_SCHEMA2; SET SCHEMA SK_GRAPH_SCHEMA2; CREATE COLUMN TABLE user_table ( user_id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255), age INT, location VARCHAR(255) ); CREATE COLUMN TABLE post_table ( post_id INT PRIMARY KEY, content VARCHAR(255), timestamp TIMESTAMP ); CREATE COLUMN TABLE comment_table ( comment_id INT PRIMARY KEY, content VARCHAR(255), timestamp TIMESTAMP ); CREATE COLUMN TABLE friend_table ( friendship_id INT PRIMARY KEY, user1_id INT NOT NULL, user2_id INT NOT NULL, since DATE ); CREATE COLUMN TABLE posted_table ( post_id INT PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL, user_id INT NOT NULL ); CREATE COLUMN TABLE commented_on_table ( comment_id INT PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL, post_id INT NOT NULL, user_id INT NOT NULL ); CREATE GRAPH WORKSPACE "social_network" EDGE TABLE friend_table KEY COLUMN "FRIENDSHIP_ID" SOURCE COLUMN "USER1_ID" REFERENCES "USER_TABLE" TARGET COLUMN "USER2_ID" REFERENCES "USER_TABLE" VERTEX TABLE "USER_TABLE" KEY COLUMN "USER_ID" EDGE TABLE "POSTED_TABLE" KEY COLUMN "POST_ID" SOURCE COLUMN "USER_ID" REFERENCES "POST_TABLE" TARGET COLUMN "POST_ID" REFERENCES "POST_TABLE" VERTEX TABLE "POST_TABLE" KEY COLUMN "POST_ID" EDGE TABLE "COMMENTED_ON_TABLE" KEY COLUMN "COMMENT_ID" SOURCE COLUMN "USER_ID" REFERENCES "COMMENT_TABLE" TARGET COLUMN "POST_ID" REFERENCES "COMMENT_TABLE" VERTEX TABLE "COMMENT_TABLE" KEY COLUMN "COMMENT_ID"; 

 

Please advise whether this kind of graph are supported in sap hana graph or what do i need to change?

entry.title: Does SAP HANA graph have gremlin query support? If yes , is there any documentation for the same?
entry.content:
I am evaluating various options for querying graph data in sap hana db.  Although SAP HANA supports Cypher query, is there a support for connection and data fetch using gremlin.

Thanks in advance.
